semantic.role: View service responsible for loading and caching indexed Spine units (folders, projects, source files) from the filesystem index documents.
responsibilities: Load indexed units from the .spine/index directory recursively using isCompatibleIndexDocument and readIndexDocument.
Cache the loaded units to avoid redundant filesystem I/O across view generation calls.
Sort folders by descending child count (and alphabetically) to prioritize folders with most structure for architecture diagram generation.
Limit the number of folders processed for architecture diagrams to MAX_ARCH_DIAGRAM_FOLDERS (12).
Report warnings via RuntimeIO when index documents fail compatibility checks or read errors occur.
outOfScope: Does not handle manifest loading or writing.
Does not perform database queries or LLM interactions.
Does not manage runtime session state or checkpoint recovery.
Does not render views or generate output -- provides data to view renderers.
invariants: Must only be used within the view service layer (src/services/view/).
Dependencies limited to fs, path, infra modules (index-reader, runtime-io), and protocol types.
Imported functions isCompatibleIndexDocument and readIndexDocument must come from ../../infra/index-reader.js.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, cached data source for view services to access indexed units without redundant filesystem scans.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: 0c6bd73 ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era (likely stable; no recent changes detected in this file)

publicSurface.description: Service class that loads, caches, and serves indexed Spine units (folders/projects/source files) for view generation. Primary consumer interface for view renderers to access the index.
Constructs a ViewIndexLoader with the root directory path and optional RuntimeIO for warnings.
Returns the cached list of LoadedUnit objects, reloading from the filesystem if not yet cached. Sorts folders by child count.
